name: go
description: Go SDK pipeline adapter for motadatagosdk. Target: Go 1.26 module motadatagosdk.

aspirational_guardrails.G104: Alloc-budget gate (CLAUDE.md rule 32, perf-confidence axis 3). Owner: sdk-profile-auditor-go. Phase: Impl M3.5. Script not yet authored.
aspirational_guardrails.G105: Soak-MMD verdict gate (rule 33). Owner: sdk-drift-detector. Phase: Testing T-SOAK. Script not yet authored.
aspirational_guardrails.G106: Soak-drift detection (rule 32 axis 6). Owner: sdk-drift-detector. Phase: Testing T-SOAK. Script not yet authored.
aspirational_guardrails.G107: Complexity-mismatch gate (rule 32 axis 4). Owner: sdk-complexity-devil-go. Phase: Testing T5. Script not yet authored.
aspirational_guardrails.G109: Profile-no-surprise hot-path coverage (rule 32 axis 2). Owner: sdk-profile-auditor-go. Phase: Impl M3.5. Script not yet authored.
aspirational_guardrails.G110: Perf-exception marker pairing (rule 32 axis 7, rule 29). Owner: sdk-marker-hygiene-devil. Phases: Impl M7 + M9. Script not yet authored.

notes.v0_6_migration_status: fully populated. Includes 3 new skills extracted in Batch 2 (go-tdd-patterns, go-idempotent-retry-patterns, go-api-ergonomics-patterns) symmetrically paired with python-pack equivalents.
notes.naming_convention: Per docs/PACKAGE-AUTHORING-GUIDE.md: language-specific agents use `-go` suffix; language-specific skills use `go-` prefix. `goroutine-leak-prevention` is kept unsuffixed since `goroutine-` already encodes Go.
notes.perf_regime_ownership: G104-G110 (perf-confidence regime, rules 32/33) and their owner agents (sdk-perf-architect-go, sdk-profile-auditor-go, sdk-complexity-devil-go, sdk-soak-runner-go, sdk-benchmark-devil-go) all live here. Symmetric Python-pack equivalents in python.json.
notes.marker_protocol_ownership: G95-G103 (marker protocol) live here because byte-hash semantics depend on source-byte offsets, currently Go-AST-specific. The sdk-marker-protocol skill and sdk-marker-scanner/sdk-marker-hygiene-devil agents stay in shared-core (cross-language); the enforcement scripts stay in this pack.
